overall.description: A first-person walk through a dense forest along a riverbank in a video game environment. The journey begins near a stone structure and progresses toward a distant waterfall, showcasing lush vegetation, calm waters, and rocky cliff formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested riverbank path near stone cabin

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path beside a calm river, passing a stone cabin on the right

entered.detail: small stone building with sloped roof partially obscured by vegetation
calm waterway flowing alongside the path with gentle currents
lush green broadleaf trees lining the riverbank
tall evergreen trees visible in the background forest
narrow winding trail following the river's edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path beside a calm river in a dense forest. A stone cabin sits on the right near the start, surrounded by lush deciduous and coniferous trees that create a partially enclosed canopy overhead.

events.description: waterfall becomes visible in the distance ahead as the forest opens slightly

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank toward the distant waterfall visible through the trees

entered.detail: tall cascade visible in the distance at the end of the river valley
distant rock formations visible on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the forested river valley as the terrain opens to reveal a distant waterfall ahead. The river widens and shifts toward the center of the frame while the path follows the bank toward the cascade, with rocky outcrops appearing on the distant right.

events.description: approaching the waterfall base where large rocky cliffs become prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking toward the base of the waterfall through increasingly rocky terrain

entered.detail: large stone cliff face and boulders dominating the right side near the waterfall

segments.scene_description: Approaching the base of the waterfall where the terrain becomes rocky with large cliff faces on the right. The river flows calmly before the cascade in a wide, open area surrounded by forested banks, with the waterfall now dominating the center view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest valley that gradually opens into a wide vista dominated by a towering waterfall. It begins on a narrow dirt path beside a calm river, passing a stone cabin nestled under a thick canopy of deciduous and coniferous trees. As the camera advances, the forested terrain expands and the river shifts toward the center of the frame, revealing the distant cascade and rocky outcrops on the horizon. The scene then transitions into a wide, open area where the river flows steadily toward the base of the falls. Finally, the camera approaches the waterfall as the landscape becomes increasingly rugged, with massive cliff faces rising on the right to frame the plummeting water.
